section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

content.p: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated such amounts as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.

section.sourceCredit: (July 15, 1955, ch. 369, § 5, formerly § 6, 69 Stat. 353; renumbered § 5, Pub. L. 105–362, title IX, § 901(i)(2), Nov. 10, 1998, 112 Stat. 3290.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 5 of act July 15, 1955, ch. 369, was classified to section 575 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 105–362, § 901(i)(1).
